title: Supertype Entity
text: Supertype Entity A Supertype Entity is an Entity that has one or more Subtype Entities . Characteristics Characteristics Icon: Object type code: ent Main Development Object? No Part of: — , Modeled Entity Contains: Field , Key , Relationship , Property , Code Container , Subtype Entity Generalization: Entity Specializations: — Compilation Output: — ent: EntityName Specialization Supertype Entity specializes Entity in the following ways: It has one or more subtype entities. It can have a parent entity, although this is true only when nesting subtype entities. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
